title: Nursery Rhyme. DXCI. Natural History.
content:
Goosy, goosy, gander,
        Who stands yonder?
        Little Betsy Baker;
        Take her up, and shake her.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXCI. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
